---
title: "Presentations"
listing:
  contents: presentations
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
---

Welcome! This site hosts slide decks built with Quarto Revealjs. See the table above for available decks.

To add a new deck, create a new `.qmd` file under `presentations/` (you can copy `presentations/example.qmd`).
